post_text: خصم اول سنة بيبقي لاول سنة بس و الزيادة السنوية مش ثابتة
translated_text: Discount for the first year is only for the first year, but the annual increase is not fixed.
signal: Annual tuition fee increases are unpredictable after the first year.

post_text: للاسف مفيش حد يقدر يفيدك كل دتور والي هو شايفو ممكن ميديش بونص خالص حتي لو نسبة كبيرة مش ناجحة
translated_text: Unfortunately, no one can help you with all the doctors who are just charlatans. They might give you a discount only if it's a big percentage that doesn't even guarantee success.
signal: Students express dissatisfaction with some professors being 'charlatans' who offer discounts without guaranteeing success.

post_text: هههههههههههه اهلا بيك في كدبة جاامعة النيل. المصاريف المحطوطه دي بيبقا علي اساس النورمال لود الهوا الطالب في الترم هياخد 18 ساعه فا هيا بتتحسب بالساعه كل سنه حساب الساعه هوا البيغلي. و اعمل حسابك ان كل سنه هتسمع اسباب متخلفه للزياده و هتطبق عليك يعني كان احد احد اسباب الزياده كانت انهم بيعنلو صيانة للاسانسيرات و اقسم بالله ده كان سبب اتقالنا و لو حولت تعترض و تعمل هيتقالك زي متقالنا كده بالنص منهم المش قادر يحول و احنا هنعملو ريكمونديشن ليتر
translated_text: Hahaha, welcome to the joke of the year at Nile University. The added fees will remain based on normal rates. For each hour of load shedding this semester, it's counted as one hour per year, and you'll be charged accordingly. Make your own calculations - every year you'll hear excuses for the increase. One of those excuses was that they were replacing elevators, I swear that was the reason we heard. If you turn off the air conditioning, they'll say you're being unreasonable just like us. They can't even change it themselves, and we have to do a re-commissioning every time.
signal: Nile University's administration is perceived as inefficient and prone to making excuses for fee increases.

translated_text: My advice: don't bother applying to the university unless you have a total grade of at least 2.00 (good). Note that if you're repeating a course, no subject will be accepted with a grade lower than good (C).
signal: University has high minimum GPA requirements for admission and repeated courses require C grades or higher.

post_text: يبني أنت ثانوية وركز تجيب مجموع عالي تجيب إن شاء الله هندسة حكومي وخد إجازتك مش وقته
translated_text:
You're building a high school, focus on getting a good score, you'll get government engineering and get your license without wasting time.

As long as Americans think your English is good, this is the first step to avoid mixing up between English 1 and English 2 all the time (make sure you check the exam schedule).

Try to keep some basic phrases like "how are you" too, so when you take the exam you'll get a score of MATH 1 instead of being absent and wasting your memory's time, it's better.
signal: Students are focused on passing exams quickly to avoid wasting time, implying a lack of emphasis on learning or understanding.
